title: Camrip fansub news thread for Evangelion 20
display_title: Camrip fansub news thread for Evangelion 20
wikitext:
[]: Camrip / fansub news thread for Evangelion 2.0 (NO SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jul 16, 2009 10:55 pm You know the drill. If there's news about camrips or fansubs for Eva 2.0, post it here, and without spoilers. Currently there's a full length camrip available and in decent quality, but as far as I know there are no subtitles out yet. If any news regarding better camrips / leaks / whatever and subtitles pops up, feel free to share.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:27 pm Isn't the 2ch sub out? mandatory bump

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:27 pm I went on THAT BOARD and saw what looke like subbed screenshots. I spent 30 minutes asking for source on those subs. I think I was trolled.

[]:             Quote Post by CATO » Sat Jul 18, 2009 5:31 pm Full cam rip? I heard of a 20 min camrip only... Link please!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jul 18, 2009 5:34 pm Only in your PM box, chum. Direct links in the public forum get nuked. You can comb this for clues where to look (at risk of spoilers).

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:25 am I didn't even need to look through the thread. Google gave me the right torrent on the first page. So people who can't find it, just use Google, it ain't that hard. EDIT: Wow, I only watched about a minute or two of the camrip before I quit. I'll just say this: only watch it if you just can't wait, because dammmmnnn, the quality's lousy.

[]:             Quote Post by Eh?vangelion » Mon Jul 20, 2009 10:16 pm Yeah, I could only view the first few minutes. The bright scenes are fairly well represented but darker ones are near completely indecipherable. What I DID see sure pumps me up, though!

[]:             Quote Post by Joe_Mo » Mon Jul 20, 2009 10:55 pm Iron Rooster wrote: EDIT: Wow, I only watched about a minute or two of the camrip before I quit. I'll just say this: only watch it if you just can't wait, because dammmmnnn, the quality's lousy.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:06 am Joe_Mo wrote: Iron Rooster wrote: EDIT: Wow, I only watched about a minute or two of the camrip before I quit. I'll just say this: only watch it if you just can't wait, because dammmmnnn, the quality's lousy.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:12 am Joe_Mo wrote: Iron Rooster wrote: EDIT: Wow, I only watched about a minute or two of the camrip before I quit. I'll just say this: only watch it if you just can't wait, because dammmmnnn, the quality's lousy.

[]:             Quote Post by thefeelingofikarishinji » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:00 am People are allowed to give their opinions about whether they like the quality of a camrip; that is called a review, not complaining. People here have the right to say whether they enjoyed the watching experience or not; just like we are entitled to pick apart Rebuild as much as we want; otherwise I guess this entire website could constitute "compalining" and should be shut down in favor of sites that mastubrate Anno 24/7. Whoever did the camrip should certainly have visited the internet/file sharing world by now, and be able to handle it.

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:50 am Well yeah but even so crying isn't really going to help. Just wait for subs, I promise it will make everything 100% better. ;p

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:06 am Just been watching the camrip. Absolutely - fucking - awesome. Know I just need the subs. The ending, though, is astounding - the nightmare-fuel-ness of the visuals far outdoes EOE - SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:08 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Just been watching the camrip. Absolutely - fucking - awesome. --spoiler for ending--

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jul 21, 2009 9:11 am It doesn't actually spoil anything - just comments on the visual look (ie They don't actually turn into devils) EDIT: Looks like someone's put a spoiler tag on it anyway - does no one listen to me?

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:06 am Joe_Mo wrote: Im sorry I registered just to tell you how unappriciative you sound. You really dont have a right to complain. you did know what you were getting yourself into right? or did you forget it was a cam rip? the quality wasn't that bad. Next, you're watching a movie that just came out in Japan, for free

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 21, 2009 11:11 am ^ And people say I rage too much. :/

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:08 pm Seriously, the other guy wasn't even being vulgar with him at all lol.

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:20 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Joe_Mo wrote: Im sorry I registered just to tell you how unappriciative you sound. You really dont have a right to complain. you did know what you were getting yourself into right? or did you forget it was a cam rip? the quality wasn't that bad. Next, you're watching a movie that just came out in Japan, for free

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jul 21, 2009 3:23 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Joe_Mo wrote: Im sorry I registered just to tell you how unappriciative you sound. You really dont have a right to complain. you did know what you were getting yourself into right? or did you forget it was a cam rip? the quality wasn't that bad. Next, you're watching a movie that just came out in Japan, for free
